description: The product and product team are so wonderful! We are currently upgrading our system to the latest version and it has been a very easy project to manage. The management team from Journyx has been with us every step of the way - providing solutions to small issues, answering questions, creating new tools to make uploading much easier/faster, etc. The product is so easy to use as well.
author: Tammy S.
pros: Ease. of. use. As the administrator of our system, the ease of use is amazing. Navigating through the system is very easy and streamlined. The Journyx team helped us to make the system extremely easy to use for our employees as well. Their team of experts provided guidance on some items during the upgrade to help us reach our various goals of the system quickly and efficiently.
cons: Nothing at this time.

description: We have used Journyx since 2003 and have been extremely satisfied with the product. Their customer service and support is exceptional.
author: Rosa S.
pros: Journyx allows us to have a centralized time keeping system which our personnel can access from all over the world. Also, with Journyx hosting our site, it gives us flexibility without having to maintain the product/platform.
cons: As an approver of multiple time sheets, I would like to have a summary of hours and be able to approve them at the same time versus having to open each individual time sheet to view the charges.

review_title: Used more than 5 years, produce time sheet reports.
author: Anu S.
pros: easy to produce report and time recording, creating users,projects
cons: not able to use cube report. We do not use this a lot now a days

description: We have used it for years and years! We love it!
author: Erica F.
pros: You can enter time AND expenses into this program! This is actually rare! It's reliable, easy to use, the customer support is great and the price isn't bad!
cons: Nothing to include here. I guess I could say I wish it was free ; )

review_title: Great time reporting system for government contractors!
description: We needed a low cost online solution to track time for government contracts and Journyx was a no-brainer! It suits all our needs and has more features we don't even use but could as we grow. Reporting is great and it integrates with QuickBooks so make payroll a breeze!
author: Shari L.
pros: Ability to customize, integration with QuickBooks, reporting.
cons: I really can't think of anything. Even when we have a problem, we contact Tech Support they are eager to work with us until it's resolved which is usually pretty quick!

description: I would definately recommend purchasing this software program!
author: Sunny G.
pros: Great support and training available. Once you know how to use it, the software is fantastic. Significant time must be spent at the beginning, but it is worth it!
cons: Not super easy to figure out with out training help, but the staff are always available to assist during the learning curve.

review_title: Journyx works great for us - a great time saver
author: Kathy B.
pros: It is a very good way to keep time for a non-profit organization as we can put in remarks and notes that help us identify individual cases in more detail. Our sister organizations also are able to use Journyx and this has helped them immensely in their timekeeping process. This has been a life saver for our reporting to our grantors.
cons: Nothing - it is working well for our organization. I have no issues with how the system runs or how we access it.

review_title: Journyx Great Value for the Money
description: If you're looking for a great time keeping tool that you can use with Quickbooks for invoicing, this is the product to buy.
author: Bernie G.
pros: Great features, easy to install and use. Sync of time data with Quickbooks. Flexible licensing model that scales with your needs.

description: The software is powerful and competitively priced , support is responsive, and is easy for users to use; however, it is cumbersome to set up new users with needed interfaces to QB, especially when it isn't something that happens very often.
author: Gail N.
pros: The software is powerful and competitively priced , support is responsive, and is easy for users to use
cons: it is cumbersome to set up new users with needed interfaces to QB, especially when it isn't something that happens very often.

review_title: Journey works great in our midsize engineering firm
author: Andrew L.
pros: Journyx is customizable and flexible enough to function well with our complex invoicing structure. There are a wide variety of reports that can be generated to facilitate analysis and planning of resources. Software support has been great over the years and they work well with our IT department to quickly and efficiently resolve issues as they occur.
cons: We have been very happy with the software and support.

description: It is easy to track a time according to projects. We can create reports in different way. Easy to manage users, projects and group.
author: Anu S.

review_title: Journyx review from an IT standpoint
author: Jennifer S.
pros: Support - If ever I needed support their team was ready to assist.
cons: Only issue I have faced is always having to have a "swing" server to do the upgrades.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Beside the crash down it was a decent app. Very ease to use. Very handy and overlay was not that much confusing.
author: Shami C.
pros: Easy navigation trough the app. Really easy to use. Tools are handy on the app. Layout of the app was really good not as confusing like different applications.
cons: Since we haven’t used a long time now but when we used to use it, we had frequent crash down on that app.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: It was quickly adopted and it is very valued by our operations and human resources teams.
description: It is a very useful software that in our company has helped to better organize the projects by crossing important data on financing and management of worked hours and availability of human resources destined to each project, it allows to better manage the distribution of working hours according to the schedules established by the managers, it accelerates administrative processes by automating them and it allows the payment of hours with more precise and updated data. I recommend it because it helps to accelerate many administrative and accounting processes allowing a more fluid development of the projects under development.
author: Leonardo S.
pros: Journyx is a very good platform, in our company it was quickly adopted and it is very valued by our operations and human resources teams, it allows a better management of the personnel and keep the budget under control, it integrates well with other administration and financial tools, it has a clear and well designed interface.
cons: We have not registered any negative opinions about this software from any sector of the company.

review_title: It's better than nothing.... but not by much
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It IS better than trying to track time in Excel, but that's about it. A few other pros: - decent (not great) reporting - not too hard to add new projects
cons: There were a lot of things I did not like about this tool. - terrible User Interface - not mobile friendly - reporting was not great - no real dashboards - could not use to forecast time/revenue - approvals of time also kind of meh

description: Our business benefits greatly from this online system where our consultants, located all over the USA, can enter time and expense for payroll, billing, etc. This is also a great tracking system for longer term reporting. We love it.
author: Claire O.
pros: Journyx is a terrific time and expense tracking system that is based in Austin, TX. We enjoy supporting our local Texas businesses, and we have found the quality, expertise, and support to be excellent. This works well with our accounting system, QB, and it's my standard for many reports daily, weekly, monthly, and annually. I can't imagine business life without it!
cons: I need to work more with the Excel reporting that is available. Haven't take the time to review since the beginning. I'm not referring to the export of reports into an Excel format. That works great.

description: We use it for payroll only, and transfer our time in bulk from our detailed project management system. This makes time tracking easy. But prior to this workflow, tracking detailed time was frustrating and less standardized across employees.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The configurability to set projects and payment codes is useful. Review and approval of employee timesheets is easy to navigate.
cons: Users can't recall their own timesheets after submitting - instead must notify manager to have it rejected, time tracking on a detailed task level would be really tedious.

description: Overall this is used daily to calculate time for all employees
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Once you understood how to read the program, selecting what you needed was easy-and it is easy to customize the program as well to fit whatever the job is.
cons: It took some time to learn how to use it. Not only can you pick a job but you can also pick role. You can do this multiple times to breakdown a day so with everything you can do, it’s a little slower to learn.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Our company uses this to track all hours for payroll purposes.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Easy to use interface and great category customization options allow end users to track their time in a very specific way that allows the company to differentiate between billable and non-billable hours.
cons: A minor issue is the layout. It is easy to place time in the wrong category due to how the lines are laid out. Things don't always appear very well.

review_title: Super robust features and great integrations
description: Journyx centralizes everything in a smart way that ensures seamless integration with existing tools.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: By far the strength of Journyx is the breadth of platform integrations, making it seamless and easy to stand up quickly. It also has a nice interface and is fairly simple to navigate.
cons: The approval workflow is a little clunky in this tool compared to other expense and time tracking software and can sometimes generate lots of email clutter.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Journyx is simple to track projects, client, and time tracking.
author: Melissa W.
pros: As a new user to Journyx. the ability to track time for clients and be able to break-down the time and expenses occurred by client is a simple process. The standard reporting is robust enough without having to add need fields to gain the information needed to manage projects and programs.
cons: Journyx does not have an cons at the present. I am able to preform all tasks as needed.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Overall, the software does what it intended to do. Our time is tracked and we are paid based off of it. So no major complaints.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It is very easy to use. To track your time, it does what we need it to do.
cons: Very basic looking. Seems like out of date software from the look of it.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: The software is perfect for our small company (less than 25 users). The Journyx team has helped us to customize the program and reports to accommodate our needs. We have some difficult billing requirements which were all built into our configuration, and any additions/changes are fairly simple to manage.
author: Laura R.
pros: Simple to manage and interface is very user friendly. I get no complaints from users on the drudgery of completing time sheets.
cons: None, really.

author: STEPHANIE I.
pros: I can post days ahead of time on my time sheet. I like knowing that at the end of the year i have a couple days that I forgot about. its a nice surprise
cons: I really have no complaints except that i do tend to forget to turn in the sheet at the end of the month sometimes.

author: Shari L.
pros: It's simple to use, integrates with QuickBooks and is reasonably priced. The product requires a low learning curve so employees need little guidance to enter their time. Managers can pull numerous reports and/or customize reports to meet their needs. We can brand the site with our logo and information as well as turn off certain features that are not relevant or that we aren't yet using. The connection to QuickBooks makes reporting and payroll a breeze.
cons: Can be quirky at times but nothing that customer support couldn't figure out. There have been times when the sync between Journyx and QuickBooks did not work as excepted but again, with the assistance of customer support, the problem was solved rather quickly. Wish the QuickBooks integration was within Journyx instead of through a separate application (AccountLink) but it just adds an extra step or two and isn't that big of a deal.
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
